title: Senior Software Engineer - Full Stack
education_required: Bachelor's in Computer Science or related field
description: We are looking for a Senior Software Engineer to join our team. You will be building and scaling our SaaS platform using React, Node.js, and AWS. Experience with microservices and containerization is required.

title: Data Scientist - NLP Specialist
education_required: Master's or PhD in Computer Science, Data Science, or related field
description: Join our NLP team to build state-of-the-art language models. You will work on text classification, entity extraction, and generative AI applications.

title: Frontend Engineer - React
description: Looking for a Frontend Engineer with strong React skills to build beautiful, performant user interfaces. You will work closely with designers and backend engineers.

title: DevOps / Platform Engineer
education_required: Bachelor's degree in CS or related
description: We need a Platform Engineer to build and maintain our cloud infrastructure. You will design CI/CD pipelines, manage Kubernetes clusters, and ensure system reliability.

title: Product Manager - SaaS
description: Lead product strategy for our B2B SaaS platform. You will define roadmap, conduct user research, and work with engineering to deliver features.

title: Junior Full Stack Developer
description: Join our fast-growing startup as a Full Stack Developer. You will work on both frontend and backend features using React and Node.js.

title: ML Engineer - Computer Vision
education_required: MS/PhD in Computer Science or related
description: Develop computer vision models for object detection, segmentation, and tracking. Deploy models to production using PyTorch and ONNX.

title: Security Engineer
description: Protect our infrastructure and applications. Conduct security assessments, implement security controls, and respond to incidents.
